visual: Balances on one leg and swings the other leg in a wide outward crescent arc, hands slapping the foot as it crosses the body.
motion_description: The sequence begins with a continuous counter-clockwise pivot on the right foot, sweeping the left leg around in a wide arc to turn the body 180 degrees. Weight shifts onto the newly planted left leg as the torso continues turning, arms crossing over the chest before the left arm extends forward horizontally. The right leg then swings upward in a high, outward crescent arc across the body from left to right, meeting the right hand which swings horizontally to slap the foot mid-air before the right leg lands forward.
